title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTION ONE OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FIVE THOUSAND SEVEN HUNDRED SIXTY-FIVE (RE PORT OF ENTRY AT MATI, DAVAO ORIENTAL).

chunks.text:
H. No. 1133 / 68 OG No. 1, 4 (January 3, 1972)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6357, June 19, 1971 ]

AN ACT AMENDING SECTION ONE OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FIVE THOUSAND SEVEN HUNDRED SIXTY-FIVE (RE PORT OF ENTRY AT MATI, DAVAO ORIENTAL).

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Section one of Republic Act Numbered Five thousand seven hundred sixty-five is amended to read as follows:

"SECTION 1. Mati in the Province of Davao Oriental is hereby made a port of entry under the jurisdiction of the Collector of Customs of Davao Oriental."

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval on June 19, 1971.
